checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-structural-similarity-1f9maa(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_structural_similarity_1f9maa\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?trapCases < 16)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?containedCases < 15 \|\| containedCases > trapCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?spaceChanges < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?runawayBranches > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using versioned and structural plus specific case evidence.
